**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Kuqiat Communication Equipment Co., Ltd. is an active micro-enterprise operating as an IT service provider and equipment reseller, completely contradicting its official registry tag as an 'Electronic Device Manufacturer'. The 'Apple Inc.' profile has been entirely eradicated. The physical parameters clearly expose this misclassification: registered in 'Room 306' of a university science park incubator with a workforce of only 7 employees and 5 Million RMB paid-in capital, it lacks any capacity for physical manufacturing. Analyzing its recovered business scope ('communication equipment leasing/repair, software development, walkie-talkie and hardware sales') confirms its true nature.
